Dinghy sailing, racing, courses for all levels.
Come sail with us!

home.stages_subtitle: Book online in a few clicks

home.meteo_station: Station ID configurable in the club back-office
home.map_subtitle: Come visit us at the harbour

club.hero_subtitle: A shared passion for sailing for over 20 years
club.history_1: Founded in 2001, our sailing club welcomes over 300 licence holders every year, from young Optimist sailors to experienced mariners. Located at the marina, we enjoy exceptional waters for all sailing disciplines.
club.history_2: Certified as an École Française de Voile, we offer training led by state-qualified instructors, following the federation values: safety, progression and conviviality.

activities.hero_subtitle: 8 disciplines to sail at any age and level

stages.hero_subtitle: Book online — secure payment via HelloAsso
stages.booking_text: Bookings are managed via HelloAsso (no fees for the club). Secure online payment. A confirmation email is sent immediately.
stages.booking_alt: You can also contact the club to book by phone or in person.

competition.hero_subtitle: Calendar, results and notices of race

prices.hero_subtitle: Join the club — sign up via HelloAsso, secure online payment
prices.memberships_subtitle: FFVoile licence included in all packages
prices.helloasso_text: All memberships are managed via HelloAsso: no admin fees, secure online payment. A confirmation email with your licence certificate is sent immediately.
prices.rental_subtitle: For members holding a competency card
prices.rental_note: * Deposit required. Reservation mandatory 48h in advance. Members with minimum certified level only.

news.hero_subtitle: All club life — results, courses, events

contact.hero_subtitle: A question? The team replies within 48h
contact.subject: Subject
contact.rgpd: I agree to my data being processed to respond to my request

find_us.hero_subtitle: Marina — access by boat, car and public transport
find_us.map_config: Google Maps integration will be enabled with your API key in the admin panel.
find_us.access_car_desc: Free parking at the marina. Follow signs for "Marina" from the town centre.
find_us.access_bus_desc: Line 12 – stop "Marina". Every 20 min in season.
find_us.access_bike_desc: Cycle path from the town square. Bike racks at the marina entrance.
find_us.access_sea_desc: Visitor moorings available on request. Call the harbour on 06 00 00 00 00.

member.hero_subtitle: Access your personal space — licence, bookings, results
member.login_subtitle: Use your email and the password received when you registered.
member.module_text: After signing in: download your licence, book boats, view racing results and pay your membership online.
